mapper.sql: select s.sale_order_id, s.order_no, s.customer_id, s.warehouse_id, s.total_qty, s.total_amount, ifnull(receivable_summary.receivable_amount, 0) as receivable_amount, ifnull(receivable_summary.received_amount, 0) as received_amount, greatest(ifnull(receivable_summary.receivable_amount, 0) - ifnull(receivable_summary.received_amount, 0), 0) as remain_receivable_amount, ifnull(( select sum(outbound_item.quantity) from wms_outbound outbound left join wms_outbound_item outbound_item on outbound_item.outbound_id = outbound.outbound_id where outbound.status = 'audited' and ( outbound.sale_order_id = s.sale_order_id or (outbound.sale_order_id is null and outbound.source_order_no = s.order_no) ) ), 0) as outbound_quantity, greatest( ifnull(s.total_qty, 0) - ifnull(( select sum(outbound_item.quantity) from wms_outbound outbound left join wms_outbound_item outbound_item on outbound_item.outbound_id = outbound.outbound_id where outbound.status = 'audited' and ( outbound.sale_order_id = s.sale_order_id or (outbound.sale_order_id is null and outbound.source_order_no = s.order_no) ) ), 0), 0 ) as remain_quantity, s.status, case when ifnull(receivable_summary.receivable_amount, 0) <= 0 then ifnull(s.payment_status, 'unpaid') when greatest(ifnull(receivable_summary.receivable_amount, 0) - ifnull(receivable_summary.received_amount, 0), 0) = 0 then 'paid' when ifnull(receivable_summary.received_amount, 0) > 0 then 'partial' else 'unpaid' end as payment_status, s.audit_by, s.audit_time, s.manager_audit_by, s.manager_audit_time, s.manager_audit_comment, s.finance_audit_comment, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.remark from wms_sale_order s left join ( select sale_order_id, sum(amount_due) as receivable_amount, sum(ifnull(amount_paid, 0)) as received_amount from fin_receivable group by sale_order_id ) receivable_summary on receivable_summary.sale_order_id = s.sale_order_id left join sys_user su on su.user_name = s.create_by
mapper.insert:
insert into wms_sale_order
order_no, customer_id, warehouse_id, total_qty, total_amount, status, payment_status, manager_audit_by, manager_audit_time, manager_audit_comment, finance_audit_comment, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{orderNo}, #{customerId}, #{warehouseId}, #{totalQty}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{paymentStatus}, #{managerAuditBy}, #{managerAuditTime}, #{managerAuditComment}, #{financeAuditComment}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark},
mapper.update: update wms_sale_order set status = #{status}, audit_by = #{auditBy}, finance_audit_comment = #{financeAuditComment}, update_by = #{updateBy}, audit_time = case when #{auditBy} is null then null else sysdate() end, update_time = sysdate() where sale_order_id = #{saleOrderId} and status = #{currentStatus}

update wms_sale_order set status = #{status}, manager_audit_by = #{managerAuditBy}, manager_audit_comment = #{managerAuditComment}, update_by = #{updateBy}, manager_audit_time = case when #{managerAuditBy} is null then null else sysdate() end, update_time = sysdate() where sale_order_id = #{saleOrderId} and status = #{currentStatus}

update wms_sale_order set status = 'submitted', manager_audit_by = null, manager_audit_time = null, manager_audit_comment = null, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where sale_order_id = #{saleOrderId} and status = #{currentStatus}

update wms_sale_order set status = 'manager_approved', audit_by = null, audit_time = null, finance_audit_comment = null, payment_status = 'unpaid', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where sale_order_id = #{saleOrderId} and status = #{currentStatus}
update wms_sale_order set payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, update_time = sysdate() where sale_order_id = #{saleOrderId}
mapper.delete:
delete from wms_sale_order where sale_order_id in
#{saleOrderId}
mapper.select: select max(order_no) from wms_sale_order where order_no like concat(#{noPrefix}, '%')
select ifnull(sum(total_amount), 0) from wms_sale_order where customer_id = #{customerId} and status in ('submitted', 'manager_approved')
mapper.update: update wms_sale_order set total_qty = ifnull((select sum(quantity) from wms_sale_order_item where sale_order_id = #{saleOrderId}), 0), total_amount = ifnull((select sum(amount) from wms_sale_order_item where sale_order_id = #{saleOrderId}), 0), update_time = sysdate() where sale_order_id = #{saleOrderId}
